about.heading: My Path to Meditation
about.body: Ruth Heinen is a spiritual coach, channel medium, fashion designer, healer and holistic lifestyle coach. Born in Germany, she has dedicated her life to helping people discover the treasure within themselves through meditation, channeling, and spiritual practices.

quote.text: Meditation is a science of lighting up all the inner resources of light and love and truth, and of learning that these inner resources are always there, and of working to find more and better ways to utilize them.
quote.author: Ruth Heinen

footer.tagline: Discover the treasure inside of you. Spiritual wellness courses, meditations, and channeling sessions by Ruth Heinen.

creditsPage.heading: Special thanks to our partners & photographers:

aboutPage.section1Body:
As a fashion designer, it has always been my greatest wish to help women express themselves, discover their true beauty and make it shine.

However, I have always noticed – especially through many of my clients who have been with me for so long – that the ups and downs of life are not easy to master just with a beautiful dress.

It takes more, and it was the same for me.

In my greatest crisis, I discovered meditation.

Meditation has helped me to get into the moment, to actually experience the present and to know that only the Here and Now counts – not the past and not the future. The greatest gift that I have received through meditation is the connection to everything that is, this experience that nothing is separate from each other and the great peace that arises as a result.

Meditation lets us feel that the true essence of our being is pure happiness and my mission is to share that with as many people as possible.

It is not difficult to learn meditation. It is very easy to integrate into everyday life.

Meditation is just a spark of awareness, a spark of true wisdom. In connecting with this spark and grounding – nothing more is needed and this happens in seconds.

This is your first step into meditation and from there you can go on and expand it to 5 minutes, 10 minutes or more, however you want it and whenever you want it, it is entirely up to you.

Do you want to learn how? Then you are at the right place. All tools are now available to you.

Nameste and see you very soon,
aboutPage.credit:
Ruth Heinen
Founder & CEO Holiu.net
Channel Medium, Fashion Designer,
Healer & Spiritual Lifestyle Coach
aboutPage.ctaBody: Explore the shop or download a free meditation to take your first step.

coursesPage.heroHeading: Change Your Life By Taking The Right Course
coursesPage.subheading: All courses and workshops are digital — available instantly after purchase.
coursesPage.featuredTitle: 2×5 Meditation Easy – Your Magic Formula for Joy & Fulfillment in Your Life
coursesPage.featuredBody1: Do you want more joy, serenity and fulfillment in your life? Then this course is exactly right for you! With just 2×5 minutes of meditation per day — once in the morning, once in the evening — you will experience a profound transformation.
coursesPage.featuredBody2: This is your magic formula: consistency + just 5 minutes = a completely new quality of life. Try it and you will be amazed at what is possible for you!

meditationPage.heroHeading: Philosophy – the art of meditation – 5min a day
meditationPage.philosophyBody:
You are a divine being who makes human experiences.

When you meditate, your soul remembers that you are divine. This spark ignites and fills your whole being with a higher vibration that has a healing effect. Time does not exist in this energy.

Therefore, 5 minutes, in the morning and in the evening, are enough to connect you with this quality of energy and align your vibration to your true being in order to achieve a lasting effect for you.

The key is consistency; twice 5 minutes a day in the morning and in the evening already work wonders.

Try it and you will be amazed!
meditationPage.quoteHay: We are all family, and the planet is our home.
meditationPage.scienceHeading: Science – benefits for your health & wellbeing
meditationPage.benefits: Helps you clear your mind|Helps you to focus on the present moment|Helps you to relax|Helps you to manage stressful situations|Helps you to control pain|Lowers the risk of depression|Can help you release addictions|Can give you a huge productivity boost|Increases self awareness|Promotes emotional health|Helps you gain a positive perspective on challenging situations|Increases your imagination and creativity|Increases your tolerance, patience and self love|Improves sleep|You can do it anywhere
meditationPage.quoteBuddha: If you are quiet enough, you will hear the flow of the universe. You will feel its rhythm. Go with this flow. Happiness lies ahead. Meditation is key.
meditationPage.quoteRuth: The first time I meditated consciously, I felt what it means to really be in the moment. The past no longer counts and the future no longer counts, I was in the now.
meditationPage.quoteRuthAuthor: Ruth Heinen, CEO & founder of HOLIU
meditationPage.quoteYogananda: Meditate more and more deeply, until calmness and joy become second nature to you.
meditationPage.discoverHeading: Discover the benefits of meditation for you
meditationPage.freeBody: Download our introductory Chakra Meditation — a gentle guided journey to centre yourself and open your energy centres.

getStarted.heading: Learn Meditation In Just Five Minutes A Day!
getStarted.p1: Are you stressed out or do you long for more energy to do all the things you have on your list? Do you wish for more joy, fulfillment and serenity every day?
getStarted.p2: Then you have made the right choice: Meditation for the first chakra gives you energy, strength, grounding, serenity and peace at the same time.
getStarted.p3: Start now and treat yourself to this elixir for your everyday life! Have fun with it and see you soon,
getStarted.thankYouBody: Click the button below to download your Chakra Meditation. Enjoy — and see you soon! 💛

about.p1: Do you want more from life? Do you feel that there is a treasure deep inside you?
about.p2: Then you are at the right place!
about.p4: Holiu offers you the opportunity to reach a higher level in all areas of your life enabling you to find more joy, serenity and peace within yourself and to be more fulfilled.
about.p5: Do you feel inspired to take your life to a new level? Would you like to know more about your life's purpose and live your true essence?
about.p6: Then don't wait any longer, you have almost reached your goal – start today and discover the treasure within you ❣
about.p7: I'm really looking forward to welcome you!

quote.text: Meditation is a process of lightening up, of trusting the basic goodness of what we have and who we are, and of realizing that any wisdom that exists, lives in what we already have. We can lead our life so as to become more awake to who we are and what we’re doing rather than trying to improve or change or get rid of who we are or what we’re doing. The key is to wake up, to become more alert, more inquisitive and curious about our true selves.
